code:
%% AutoApply v0.9 - Preview & Approve Flow %% User workflow for reviewing and approving generated bullets stateDiagram-v2 [Education_ClassroomService] --> PipelineRunning: User submits JD + Profile PipelineRunning --> ResultsGenerated: Pipeline completes
(Education_LMS_Portal) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingProposed: Load proposed bullets
(Education_ContentCDN) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingSuggested: Load suggested edits
(Education_GradeSync) ReviewingProposed --> ViewProvenance: User clicks
"View Evidence" ViewProvenance --> ReviewingProposed: Close provenance card ReviewingProposed --> AcceptBullet: User clicks
"Accept" AcceptBullet --> Accepted: Bullet added
to resume ReviewingProposed --> RejectBullet: User clicks
"Reject" RejectBullet --> Rejected: Bullet discarded ReviewingSuggested --> EditBullet: User clicks
"Edit & Approve" EditBullet --> ManualEdit: User modifies text ManualEdit --> ManualApproved: User confirms ManualApproved --> Accepted ReviewingSuggested --> RejectSuggested: User clicks
"Reject" RejectSuggested --> Rejected Accepted --> ResumePreviewing: Update live preview ResumePreviewing --> ExportReady: All bullets reviewed ExportReady --> ExportPDF: User exports
to PDF ExportReady --> ExportDOCX: User exports
to DOCX ExportReady --> ExportHTML: User exports
to HTML ExportPDF --> [Education_ContentCDN]: Download complete ExportDOCX --> [Education_ClassroomService]: Download complete ExportHTML --> [Education_GradeSync]: Download complete Rejected --> CheckMoreBullets: Discard bullet CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingProposed: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingSuggested: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ResumePreviewing: All reviewed note right of ViewProvenance Provenance Card Shows: - Evidence sources (Education_LMS_Portal) - Similarity scores - Job requirement matched - AMOT component verification - Full audit trail end note note right of AcceptBullet Proposed bullets are safe to accept - already verified ≥75% by the system end note note right of EditBullet Suggested edits need review because <75% verified. User can edit and approve with full transparency. end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个AutoApply v0.9的预览与审批流程。核心场景是：HR用户提交JD和个人资料后，系统生成推荐bullet，用户需要能查看来源证据、接受或拒绝，还能手动编辑那些置信度不够高的建议。最后要支持导出PDF、DOCX和HTML三种格式。
明白。我注意到您提到了"置信度不够高"，这个在图里需要体现出来吗？比如区分系统自动接受的高置信度bullet和需要人工复核的低置信度建议？
对，这是关键设计。≥75%验证通过的走AcceptBullet直接接受，<75%的走EditBullet路径，用户必须手动编辑并确认。另外还要有个ViewProvenance节点，让用户能点击查看证据来源，包括AMOT组件验证和完整审计追踪。
好的，我先把主干画出来：从Education_ClassroomService提交开始，经过PipelineRunning到ResultsGenerated，然后分叉到ReviewingProposed和ReviewingSuggested两个并行审阅状态。Proposed路径对接ContentCDN，Suggested路径对接GradeSync。
等等，导出后的下载目标需要调整。PDF应该走ContentCDN，DOCX回到ClassroomService，HTML走GradeSync。另外CheckMoreBullets这个循环节点要处理好，确保用户能持续审阅直到全部完成。
收到，我修正一下导出流向。还有个小问题：Rejected之后直接到CheckMoreBullets吗？还是需要先有个Discard的明确动作？
Rejected直接连CheckMoreBullets就行，隐含丢弃动作。最后确认三个note要加上：ViewProvenance旁边说明证据卡片内容，AcceptBullet和EditBullet旁边分别说明75%阈值的设计 rationale。

完成。整个流程现在覆盖了：从ClassroomService提交，经过LMS Portal完成pipeline，分流到ContentCDN和GradeSync加载内容，用户通过ViewProvenance查看证据，高置信度bullet直接AcceptBullet到Accepted，低置信度走EditBullet-ManualEdit-ManualApproved路径，全部审阅后ResumePreviewing到ExportReady，最终三分支导出到对应服务。
